summary: Accounting Automation E2E Testing - 23/23 backend tests passed (100%), Frontend UI verified working. Fixed 1 bug (missing timedelta import). All 3 phases of accounting automation working.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/accounting/payroll-journal - creates journal entry with FICA, Medicare, Hacienda, 10% withholding
Backend: POST /api/accounting/payroll-journal - duplicate prevention works
Backend: POST /api/accounting/expense-journal - creates journal for material expense
Backend: POST /api/accounting/expense-journal - creates journal for labor expense
Backend: POST /api/accounting/expense-journal - creates journal for subcontractor expense
Backend: POST /api/accounting/invoice-journal - creates journal entry and AR record
Backend: POST /api/accounting/invoice-journal - handles invoices without tax
Backend: POST /api/accounting/payment-journal - creates journal and updates AR balance
Backend: POST /api/accounting/payment-journal - handles partial payments
Backend: POST /api/accounting/sync-purchase-orders - syncs POs to AP
Backend: POST /api/accounting/subcontractor-payment - 10% withholding calculated correctly ($10,000 gross -> $1,000 withholding -> $9,000 net)
Backend: POST /api/accounting/subcontractor-payment - without withholding (gross = net)
Backend: POST /api/accounting/subcontractor-payment - custom withholding rate (7%)
Backend: POST /api/accounting/sync-invoices - syncs unpaid invoices to AR
Backend: POST /api/accounting/sync-payroll - legacy endpoint working
Backend: GET /api/accounting/journal-entries - lists all entries
Backend: GET /api/accounting/accounts-receivable - lists AR records
Backend: GET /api/accounting/accounts-payable - lists AP records
Backend: GET /api/accounting/tax-liabilities - lists tax liabilities
Backend: GET /api/accounting/chart-of-accounts - includes 2260 and 2270 accounts
Backend: GET /api/accounting/dashboard - returns summary data
Backend: GET /api/health - API healthy
Frontend: Accounting Dashboard - shows Total Assets, Liabilities, Net Worth, Net Income
Frontend: 3 sync buttons visible - 'Sincronizar Facturas', 'Sincronizar Nóminas', 'Sincronizar Órdenes de Compra'
Frontend: Sync buttons click and show toast messages
Frontend: Chart of Accounts tab - shows all accounts including 2260 and 2270
Frontend: Account 2260 (Retención 10% Servicios Profesionales) exists
Frontend: Account 2270 (Retención Hacienda PR) exists
Frontend: Payroll page shows 10% contractor withholding rate
Frontend: Payroll page shows Hacienda 0%, Seguro Social 6.2%, Medicare 1.45%, Contratistas 10%

bugs_fixed.fix: Changed 'from datetime import datetime, timezone' to 'from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta'

seed_data_creation: Test journal entries created with TEST_ prefix for payroll, expense, invoice, payment, and subcontractor payment testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accounting automation fully tested. 3 phases implemented: 1) Payroll→Accounting with FICA, Medicare, Hacienda, 10% contractor withholding, 2) Project Expenses/Invoices/Payments→Accounting with AR management, 3) Purchase Orders→Accounts Payable. Accounts 2260 (Retención 10%) and 2270 (Retención Hacienda) are seeded in chart of accounts. Frontend has 3 sync buttons on Accounting dashboard. Payroll page shows contractor 10% withholding rate.

phase_1_payroll.payroll_journal_entry: WORKING - Creates journal with proper debits/credits

phase_2_projects.invoice_journal: WORKING - Creates AR and journal entry
phase_2_projects.payment_journal: WORKING - Updates AR balance and creates journal

phase_3_purchase_orders.sync_po_to_ap: WORKING - Syncs approved POs to AP
phase_3_purchase_orders.po_journal_entry: WORKING - Creates journal with Materials debit, AP credit

subcontractor_payment.custom_rate_support: WORKING - Can specify different withholding rates

frontend_ui.sync_buttons: WORKING - 3 buttons for Invoices, Payroll, POs
